texts.label: text
texts.orig: All contract rates are gross and commissionable. All rates are confidential and cannot be published. Rates are per person per night sharing double room for standard to junior suite. VAT is included in all rates.
texts.text: All contract rates are gross and commissionable. All rates are confidential and cannot be published. Rates are per person per night sharing double room for standard to junior suite. VAT is included in all rates.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All Government Taxes and regulations are subject to change.
texts.text: All Government Taxes and regulations are subject to change.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All bookings cancellations, must be advised in writing to the reservation's office. From 21 st Dec -4 th Jan, any cancellation within 21 days of arrival will attract 100% charge of the entire booking.  0
texts.text: All bookings cancellations, must be advised in writing to the reservation's office. From 21 st Dec -4 th Jan, any cancellation within 21 days of arrival will attract 100% charge of the entire booking.  0

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: -7 days prior to guest's arrival and No show -100% of the entire booking value.
texts.text: -7 days prior to guest's arrival and No show -100% of the entire booking value.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel cannot be held liable for any cancellation fee or compensation in the event that clients need to amend the check-in or check-out dates due to changes in their personal travel plans
texts.text: The hotel cannot be held liable for any cancellation fee or compensation in the event that clients need to amend the check-in or check-out dates due to changes in their personal travel plans

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For blocks and allocations: any cancellation within the release period and No Shows will attract 100% cancellation charges of the total booking value.
texts.text: For blocks and allocations: any cancellation within the release period and No Shows will attract 100% cancellation charges of the total booking value.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The hotel cannot be held liable for any cancellation fee or compensation in the event that the clients need to amend the check-in or check-out dates due to any cause beyond the control of the hotel, including strike, lockouts, civil commotion, war or warlike operations or imminence thereof, riots, civil war, blockade, embargo, fire, flood, epidemics, quarantine or storms
texts.text: The hotel cannot be held liable for any cancellation fee or compensation in the event that the clients need to amend the check-in or check-out dates due to any cause beyond the control of the hotel, including strike, lockouts, civil commotion, war or warlike operations or imminence thereof, riots, civil war, blockade, embargo, fire, flood, epidemics, quarantine or storms

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Payment to be received at least 7 days prior to the arrival of the clients. Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification. All payments made by cheque must be cleared prior to the arrival of the clients. In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as "unpaid" for any reason the agent shall replace the payment by cash and additionally agrees to pay the returned cheque fee thereof.
texts.text: Payment to be received at least 7 days prior to the arrival of the clients. Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification. All payments made by cheque must be cleared prior to the arrival of the clients. In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as "unpaid" for any reason the agent shall replace the payment by cash and additionally agrees to pay the returned cheque fee thereof.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The agent agrees to pay any and all costs, including legal fees, court costs and any other expenses incurred by Diani Reef Beach Resort in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques.
texts.text: The agent agrees to pay any and all costs, including legal fees, court costs and any other expenses incurred by Diani Reef Beach Resort in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheques.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Diani Reef Beach Resort accounts department within 4 days of invoicing and the only amount in dispute may be deducted from the, invoice, which must be made within the specific time limit. Last minute bookings to be paid in full
texts.text: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Diani Reef Beach Resort accounts department within 4 days of invoicing and the only amount in dispute may be deducted from the, invoice, which must be made within the specific time limit. Last minute bookings to be paid in full

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Default of undisputed payment may result in Agent's clients being refused admission to the camp until payment is made. Consistent default will result in cancellation of this agreement.
texts.text: Default of undisputed payment may result in Agent's clients being refused admission to the camp until payment is made. Consistent default will result in cancellation of this agreement.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Welcome drink. In room mini fridge, coffee and tea making facilities. Breakfast, lunch and dinner served at the CRC Restaurant. Fins and Waves bar are open from 10:00 am to 11:00pm and serves soft drinks, fruit juices, coffee and tea, local beer, house wine and selected cocktails. Snacks are offered between 11am-12pm and 4pm-5pm. Wifi Internet in all rooms and public areas. Fitness and gymnastic activities, padel court, table tennis, billiard, beach volley, non-motorized water sports, soft animation and evening entertainment program with local shows. Coco Jumbo Kids Club. Daily beach and pool towels. Sunshades, sun loungers by the pool and on the beach. Christmas & New Year lunch and dinner special programs.
texts.text: Welcome drink. In room mini fridge, coffee and tea making facilities. Breakfast, lunch and dinner served at the CRC Restaurant. Fins and Waves bar are open from 10:00 am to 11:00pm and serves soft drinks, fruit juices, coffee and tea, local beer, house wine and selected cocktails. Snacks are offered between 11am-12pm and 4pm-5pm. Wifi Internet in all rooms and public areas. Fitness and gymnastic activities, padel court, table tennis, billiard, beach volley, non-motorized water sports, soft animation and evening entertainment program with local shows. Coco Jumbo Kids Club. Daily beach and pool towels. Sunshades, sun loungers by the pool and on the beach. Christmas & New Year lunch and dinner special programs.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Express check in. Late check out subject to availability. Welcome drink on arrival.  Full room service included at no extra charge for all meal options.  Premium selection of branded spirits, beer and wine.  Reserved sunbeds  with drinks service
texts.text: Express check in. Late check out subject to availability. Welcome drink on arrival.  Full room service included at no extra charge for all meal options.  Premium selection of branded spirits, beer and wine.  Reserved sunbeds  with drinks service

table_cells.text: Premium All Inclusive is bookable only for adults (above 18 years). The supplement needs to be booked for all adults sharing the room and for the full stay.
The supplement is not subject to any special offer or early booking discount. Minimum nights required: 4
